Trend Cloud One

Currently, status information is provided primarily for Trend Cloud One - Endpoint & Workload Security.
Additional Trend Cloud One services will be added in the future.
For information on Trend Cloud One's maintenance schedule, please visit here.

The system is stable and running smoothly.

Wednesday, Nov 12, 2025

Unstable access to console in sg-1 region

Impact
  • Service not available
Region Affected
Asia Pacific (including Middle East and Africa)
Resolved

Trend Micro service engineers have confirmed that the implemented solution has resolved the issue. All affected services are considered back  to normal and the issue has been resolved.

Nov 13, 2025, 04:00 PM UTC
Monitoring

Trend Micro service engineers have implemented a solution and are monitoring services at this time. We greatly appreciate your patience while we are returning services to normal.

Nov 13, 2025, 07:30 AM UTC
Update

Trend Micro service engineers are still addressing an ongoing issue. We are continuing to work towards a resolution and restoring services as soon as possible. More information will posted as available, and we greatly appreciate your patience as we work to a resolution.

Nov 12, 2025, 07:30 PM UTC
Identified

Trend Micro service engineers have successfully identified the cause of the incident and are actively developing a solution to mitigate the impact. More information will be posted as available, and we greatly appreciate your patience as we work towards a resolution.

Nov 12, 2025, 04:30 PM UTC
Investigating

Trend Micro service engineers are actively investigating a potential issue that may be affecting our customers. Some services may experience temporary degradation or intermittent availability. We are working to identify the specific impact and resolve the issue as quickly as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and greatly appreciate your patience as we work towards a prompt resolution.

Saturday, Jul 26, 2025

Trend Cloud One - Endpoint & Workload Security: Planned Maintenance

Impact
  • Service not available
Region Affected
Asia Pacific (including Middle East and Africa)
Americas (North and South)
Europe
Japan
Resolved
Jul 26, 2025, 10:00 AM UTC
Planned Maintenance

https://docs.trendmicro.com/en-us/documentation/article/trend-micro-cloud-one-main-maintenance-schedule

 

Scheduled general maintenance


System maintenance for Trend Cloud One is scheduled for all regions between 03:00 and 10:00 UTC on Saturday, July 26, 2025.

 

During this period, the following services will be unavailable:
 
  • Trend Cloud One - Endpoint & Workload Security agent connections.

  • Administration and API access to the Trend Cloud One - Endpoint & Workload Security console.

  • Event forwarding (for example, SNS and syslog).


This maintenance window does not impact protection provided by existing Trend Cloud One - Workload Security agents. Agents activated prior to the maintenance window will continue to provide protection until the service is restored.


Trend Micro allocates 7 hours for maintenance, but strives to finish this work as quickly as possible.

Jul 26, 2025, 03:00 AM UTC
